title: Tangy Chinese Chicken Breast
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the tanginess of ma la sauce with the richness of chicken breast.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together ma la sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and coat with the sauce.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add sesame oil. Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve with green onions and additional ma la sauce, if desired.
